subject: WM-0087 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified map-dirty keeps the original dirtyCellsInsideChunk/inline update object/grid.updateCell path and original timer window, adding only 16 identical-pass averaging per sample; default bench sampling is 9/2. Full-suite pnpm bench --artifacts-dir %TEMP%/wuming-town/WM-0087/review4-bench-full-suite passed with entity-store 236.361ms vs 244.507ms, m5-alpha-content-long-run 55.536ms vs 74.634ms, and map-dirty 0.953ms vs 1.000ms. Baseline/10%/20% thresholds/M5 artifacts/sim-core unchanged; Chrome/Edge Web conclusion remains demo-only with same-spec/lower-cap/lower-fast-forward unproved.
